title: Setting Up Jenkins Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Jenkins installation and setup.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is 'Jenkins' used for?
options: To automate the building, testing, and deployment of your project's code changes

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a Jenkins-based workflow?
options: Installing Jenkins on a dedicated server to provide a central and powerful automation platform
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories
